identity.name: Leiva's Import SAAS
identity.description: A high-performance command center for global trade. Dark backgrounds to reduce eye strain during long shifts, pierced by neon green data points for instant status recognition.

typography.installation: Must install '@fontsource/barlow-condensed', '@fontsource/inter', '@fontsource/jetbrains-mono' or add via Google Fonts in index.html

structure.sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-64 bg-background border-r border-border z-50 hidden md:flex flex-col

components.buttons: rounded-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wide hover:shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(0,255,132,0.3)] transition-all duration-300
components.cards: bg-card border border-border/50 rounded-sm shadow-none hover:border-primary/30 transition-colors
components.inputs: bg-secondary/50 border-input rounded-sm focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary focus:border-primary font-mono text-sm
components.badges: rounded-none px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] uppercase font-bold tracking-wider

visual_enhancers.gradients: None. Flat colors or subtle radial glow for active states.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.02) on background to reduce banding.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid border-zinc-800. Active elements get 'The Tracing Beam' effect (green glow).
visual_enhancers.shadows: Hard shadows or glow effects. No soft diffuse material shadows.

assets.icons: Lucide React (Square, sharp variants preferred, e.g., 'Container', 'Ship', 'FileText', 'Activity')

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. UPDATE THEME: Modify /app/frontend/src/index.css with the provided CSS variables in 'colors.css_vars_override'. This is CRITICAL for the neon green/dark mode look.
2. INSTALL FONTS: Use Google Fonts CDN in index.html for Barlow Condensed (Weights: 400, 600, 700) and JetBrains Mono.
3. LAYOUT: Implement a responsive Sidebar Layout (Shell). The sidebar must be collapsible on mobile.
4. COMPONENTS: Do not use rounded-xl or rounded-2xl. Force 'rounded-sm' or 'rounded-md' in tailwind config or utility classes.
5. CHARTS: Use Recharts (via shadcn/charts if available) with the custom green palette. Chart lines should be thin (strokeWidth={1.5}).
6. TABLES: Build a reusable DataTable component that supports density. Logistics data is heavy; minimal padding is preferred.
7. LANGUAGE: All hardcoded text in the UI must be in Spanish.
8. AUTH: Create a Login page with the 'login_bg' image as a side cover or background overlay.
universal_guidelines: Don't use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid deep blacks/grays.
Use 'Neon Green' (#00ff84) sparingly for CTAs and active states only. Don't overuse it.
Inputs should look like 'terminal' inputs or technical fields (dark bg, light text, monospaced).
All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
